case_title: CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. LYNN FULLER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT FULLER, LYNN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT FULLER, LYNN
